arts.ttl: This Week In Lazio History: March 3-9
arts.sum: This week we remember derby wins, an 8-2 against Fiorentina, other victories against the big clubs of the north, plus one of the biggest refereeing scandals of all time. arts.ttl: Lazio Chasing Rising Serbian Teenager but Face Competition From Jose Mourinho
arts.sum: Lazio are reportedly one of several clubs interested in exciting young Serbian striker Mihajlo Cvetkovic. New Striker Needed The Biancocelesti are apparently looking to add a young bomber to their ranks next season. arts.ttl: Lazio Outcast Still Hoping To Be Reinstated – Deadline Revealed
arts.sum: Lazio full-back Luca Pellegrini is still determined to regain his spot in the club’s Serie A squad list following his recent omission. The Background The Biancocelesti life-long supporter served as Nuno Tavares’ understudy during the first half of the season, but lost his manager’s favor in January. arts.ttl: How Lazio Will Finance €450M Stadio Flaminio Project
arts.sum: A report from Calcio e Finanza explains how Lazio plan to fund their project to renovate the Stadio Flaminio project. The Background The Biancocelesti are looking to have their own stadiums, thus parting ways from Roma, with whom they share the Stadio Olimpico.
